nasb.text: The east border was the Salt Sea, as far as the mouth of the Jordan. And the border of the north side was from the bay of the sea at the mouth of the Jordan.

esv.text: And the east boundary is the Salt Sea, to the mouth of the Jordan. And the boundary on the north side runs from the bay of the sea at the mouth of the Jordan.

cnv.text: 東方的疆界是從鹽海直到約旦河口。北方的疆界是從約旦河口的海灣起，

ccb.text: 东面以盐海南端到约旦河口为边界。 北界从约旦河口的海湾开始，
